docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS, ABRAHAM AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, YUNG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-21-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, ABRAHAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEN, YUNG $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $320.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF NOV-18-1999, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, YUNG
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, YUNG
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, YUNG HEARING SET FOR NOV-18-1999 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, YUNG
